project: Real-Time Smart Health Monitoring System with Drift-Aware ML

phases.name: Foundation & Wearable Data Ingestion
phases.theme: Kafka + Docker + CI/CD skeleton + data schemas

phases.name: Stream Processing & Feature Engineering
phases.theme: Faust consumers + windowing + feature extraction + Redis

phases.name: ML Model Training & Real-Time Serving
phases.theme: MLflow + XGBoost/LSTM + FastAPI + model registry + A/B

phases.name: Drift Detection with Evidently
phases.theme: Evidently reports + Grafana dashboards + Slack alerts

phases.name: Airflow-Triggered Retraining Pipeline
phases.theme: Airflow DAGs + auto-retraining + canary deploy + rollback

phases.name: Hardening, Tests & Documentation
phases.theme: Integration tests + load testing + docs + security
